title: Change Button Characteristics/Color when clicked
excerpt: It would be super helpful to have a visual indicator that button has been clicked. Not disable, but perhaps change color. Thank you!

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be super helpful to have a visual indicator that button has been clicked. Not disable, but perhaps change color. Thank you!

posts.author: Clarey (MondayMotivator)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @KCordaro im trying to think about your use case and how this would work as most status have colours pre set.

We use the last updated column which I find super useful not sure if that would work?

posts.author: KCordaro (KCORD)
posts.cookedHtml:
MondayMotivator:

e the last up

Yes thank you Clare. That’s exactly what I’m doing but it clutters the data when I’d like to know that it’s been hit at least once (color change indicator would suffice) and then if I need the details etc I can go into Activity if needed.

posts.author: kaje (Kate)
posts.cookedHtml:
A few suggestions depending on what might work for your button function:

  • Use the Voting column instead of a button
  • Set a Status to reflect a click
  • Count clicks by increasing Numbers

posts.author: Ag47Panda (Steve Wasson)
posts.cookedHtml: Simple trick I use it so pair the button with a status field so when the button is clicked it changes the status to SENT or whatever. You can also setup qualifiers for the button so they have to set the status to READY before it will work. Sometimes a nice reminder is helpful for users. You can also track button clicks in the Activity tab but that is a big of digging.
